utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each one is fully specified with coverage details and associated costs (either explicitly stated or noted as included in consolidated monthly cost). The total_budget section provides monthly, annual, and one-time setup cost details. Therefore, all required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists a single plan name repeated across all coverage types — 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan80'. In the ground-truth dataset, there is a 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance, rated 10. The 'Plan80' variant does not appear separately, so we map it to the closest available match, 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan'. Since all coverage categories (health, property, travel, and additional services) reference the same plan name, they all correspond to the same product and thus share its rating of 10.
